prompt: Hyper-realistic sports broadcast snapshot: A soccer stadium at night is filled to capacity, with a brightly tempered woman in the crowd. She is wearing a dark brown sleeveless turtleneck satin top, black square earrings, and shoulder-length light brown-golden hair styled in soft waves. She casually drinks from a blue aluminum can and holds a half-eaten cheeseburger in the other hand. Surrounded by fans in bright yellow and royal blue jerseys and scarves, creating a vivid team color contrast. The overall image is natural and cinematic, captured from a sports TV broadcast camera perspective during a game moment, using a shallow depth of field. Replicates realistic stadium seating and a crowded atmosphere; the top left has a broadcast overlay with live scores and timers, and the top right has a sports channel watermark. Natural stadium lighting and realistic skin textures; the main subject is in sharp focus with a blurred background crowd, 16:9 ratio.
